title: Nodule cleaning
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bu3ev","text":"Adapted for high throughput of small samples for sequencing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"p36o","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"47u49","text":"Based on doi:10.1371/journal.pone.0047677","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cleanly cut nodules from plant roots and drop into a 2ml Eppendorf tube per plant.
Remove as much liquid as possible without removing loose nodules
Remove as much liquid as possible
Remove as much liquid as possible go to step #7
